Name: Header
Description: Welcome users and let them to know what they need to do

Name: Email
Default State:
1. Prepopulate users' business email 
2. This form is read-only. It’s not allowed to edit or change this email.

Name: Create password
Description: This text field is to input new password
Dynamic Behaviour:
Along with password entering, 
check with the password requirements. Sign%20up%20309374cae3fa811a8638ddca28f6f2ca.md
Default State: By default focus on the "create password" field, when users land on this page. Sign%20up%20309374cae3fa811a8638ddca28f6f2ca.md
Error State: When the password is not meet requirements, the text input field become to red color.

Name: Confirm password
Description: This text field allows the user to double confirm the password
Dynamic Behaviour: After enter password in the text field, clicking the outside of the text field to validate the password
Error State: If this password is different with the previous input, both “create password” and “Confirm password” text fields become to red color. Display a error message at the bottom of the password requirements Sign%20up%20309374cae3fa811a8638ddca28f6f2ca.md

Name: Show password checkbox
Description: This check box allows to show/hide the password
Dynamic Behaviour:
1. When the checkbox is checked, show the password
2. When the checkbox is unchecked, hide the password
Default State: By default, the check box will be unselected.

Name: Primary button
Description: This button allows the user to submit the password info.
Dynamic Behaviour: Click on the primary button to submit the data.

Name: Password requirements
Description: The password need to meet all these requirements to be created.
Dynamic Behaviour: Along with the user enter the password, when the password meets one requirement, active that requirement checkmark with green color. Sign%20up%20309374cae3fa811a8638ddca28f6f2ca.md
Default State: By default, all check mark are gray. Sign%20up%20309374cae3fa811a8638ddca28f6f2ca.md
Error State: When the user click the outside of the text field, display red color checkmark for the miss password requirements. Sign%20up%20309374cae3fa811a8638ddca28f6f2ca.md

Name: Error info
Dynamic Behaviour:
1. When the password include some word which is in the dictionary words, check password after user stop typing in x seconds delay error message “This password is too easy to guess. Please try a more secure password.”  (Engineer gives time frame)Sign%20up/SU%200%20Landing%20screen/Password%20requirements%20309374cae3fa816caff9e8ce7a4c34a7.md
2. Hover over on the link “Password tips” to show the tooltip.Sign%20up%20309374cae3fa811a8638ddca28f6f2ca.md
3. When the two passwords don’t match, display error message at bottom. Sign%20up%20309374cae3fa811a8638ddca28f6f2ca.md
